beefs.title: Kim Jae-joong
beefs.about: Kim Jae-joong enrolled in a distance learning university that did not require an entrance exam, but later dropped out. He engaged in deceptive conduct by including this university—from which he had withdrawn—in his website profile. In January 2022, the fact that Kim Jae-joong had dropped out of university became public in South Korea following an inquiry from a Chinese national.
quotes: Kim Jae-joong enrolled in a distance learning university that did not require an entrance exam, but later dropped out. He engaged in deceptive conduct by including this university—from which he had withdrawn—in his website profile. In January 2022, the fact that Kim Jae-joong had dropped out of university became public in South Korea following an inquiry from a Chinese national.

Kim Jae-joong se matriculó en una universidad a distancia que no exigía examen de ingreso, pero posteriormente abandonó los estudios. Incurrió en una conducta engañosa al incluir dicha universidad —de la cual se había retirado— en el perfil de su sitio web. En enero de 2022, el hecho de que Kim Jae-joong había dejado la universidad se hizo público en Corea del Sur a raíz de una consulta realizada por una persona de nacionalidad china.

There is no article about Kim Jaejoong's graduation. Usually, an article comes out after graduation. It's true that Kim Jaejoong dropped out of college. In addition to me, there are multiple testimonies in Korea.The Korean version was corrected in 2023 to state that Kim Jaejoong dropped out of university. How can I correct the English version? Please let me know.
